acc_color_contrast: We use a semantic color system designed to maintain sufficient contrast ratios across both light and dark modes. Status indicators (budget warnings, goals, categories) use distinct shapes and labels in addition to color, so information is never conveyed by color alone.
acc_commitment: Expense Tracker Genius is committed to making personal finance management accessible to everyone. We build with Apple's accessibility frameworks and continuously work to improve the experience for all users, including those who rely on assistive technologies.
acc_dark_mode: Full Dark Mode support is built in. The app automatically follows your system appearance setting, reducing eye strain in low-light environments. All screens, widgets, and the Apple Watch app adapt to your chosen color scheme.
acc_dynamic_type: Expense Tracker Genius respects your preferred text size set in iOS Settings. The interface adapts to larger or smaller text sizes using Apple's Dynamic Type system, so you can read comfortably throughout the app.
acc_feedback: We are always working to improve accessibility. If you encounter any barriers or have suggestions, please contact us at hussein.juybari@gmail.com. Your feedback helps us make the app better for everyone.
acc_localization: The app is available in 12 languages, including right-to-left languages (Arabic and Persian). The entire interface — including widgets and the Apple Watch app — adapts layout and text direction automatically based on your language setting.
acc_reduce_motion: The app respects the Reduce Motion accessibility setting. When enabled, animations are minimized or removed entirely, providing a calmer, distraction-free experience while retaining full functionality.
acc_voice_control: You can use Voice Control to interact with the app hands-free. Siri Shortcuts and App Intents allow you to add expenses, check balances, and access common tasks using your voice. These integrations work with both Siri and the Shortcuts app.
acc_voiceover: The app supports Apple's VoiceOver screen reader. Interactive elements include descriptive accessibility labels, hints, and values so you can navigate and manage your finances without needing to see the screen. Charts and budget progress indicators provide spoken summaries of your financial data.
acc_watch_widgets: The Apple Watch app and Home Screen widgets are built with the same accessibility standards. VoiceOver reads widget content, and the watch app supports Dynamic Type and the system accessibility features available on watchOS.
accessibility_meta_description: Accessibility information for Expense Tracker Genius iOS app
cta_text: Track your actual travel expenses with the full app
disclaimer: Costs are estimates based on 2026 averages for a single traveler.
home_ai_desc: Scan receipts with your camera and let AI categorize expenses automatically. Get intelligent spending insights and predictions — all processed on-device with Apple Intelligence.
home_cta_travel_link: Try our Travel Budget App Clip
home_hero_subtitle: Smart expense tracking with AI insights. Privacy-first — your data never leaves your device.
home_meta_description: Smart expense tracking with AI insights, receipt scanning, budgets, and more. Privacy-first — no servers, all on-device. Available on iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch.
home_meta_title: Expense Tracker Genius — Smart AI Expense Tracking
home_platforms_desc: iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch — your finances sync seamlessly across all your devices.
home_privacy_card1_desc: All data stays on your device. No servers, no tracking, no accounts required.
home_privacy_card2_desc: Optional iCloud sync keeps your data encrypted and only accessible to you.
home_privacy_card3_desc: No hidden analytics. No data selling. Just a tool that respects your privacy.
home_transactions_desc: Capture receipts, attach photos, and track every expense with precision. Multi-currency support with live exchange rates from the European Central Bank.
home_travel_desc: Plan your next trip with budget estimates for 25+ destinations. Track expenses on the go and compare with your planned budget. Try it instantly with our App Clip — no download needed.
privacy_ai: AI-powered features run entirely on your device using Apple's on-device Foundation Models. This includes financial insights, category predictions, receipt scanning enhancement, and travel cost estimation. No financial or travel data is sent to any external server. Your spending patterns, travel plans, and AI-generated insights never leave your device.
privacy_analytics: We use Google Analytics for Firebase to collect anonymous usage statistics, such as which screens are viewed and which features are used. This helps us understand how to improve the app. No personal information, financial data, or transaction details are ever included. You can disable this anytime in Settings.
privacy_camera: The camera is used exclusively for scanning receipts. Receipt images are processed entirely on your device using Apple's Vision framework for text recognition (OCR). No images are uploaded to any server. Imported photos from your library are also processed locally. You can delete receipt attachments at any time from within the app.
privacy_children: Expense Tracker Genius is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect any personal information from children.
privacy_contact: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or your data, please contact us at hussein.juybari@gmail.com.
privacy_crashlytics: We use Firebase Crashlytics to collect anonymous crash reports when the app encounters an error. These reports contain only technical information (device model, OS version, stack traces) and never include your personal or financial data. You can disable this anytime in Settings.
privacy_data_retention: We have no servers or remote databases — your financial data never leaves your device (or your personal iCloud account if sync is enabled). If you delete the app, all local data is permanently removed. iCloud data can be managed through your device's iCloud settings.\n\nAnonymous analytics data (if enabled) is retained by Google for 14 months, then automatically deleted. Crash reports are retained for 90 days.
privacy_data_storage: Your financial data is stored exclusively on your device using Apple's secure storage. If you enable iCloud Sync, your data is encrypted and synced through Apple's CloudKit infrastructure — we never see or access this data.
privacy_exchange_rates: Exchange rates for currency conversion are fetched from the Frankfurter API (European Central Bank data) for fiat currencies and the Binance public API for cryptocurrency prices. Only currency code pairs are transmitted (e.g. EUR/USD) — no personal, financial, or account data is sent. Rates are cached locally on your device for 6 hours to minimize network requests.
privacy_icloud: If you enable iCloud Sync, your data is synced across your devices using Apple's CloudKit. This data is encrypted and governed by Apple's privacy policy. We do not operate any servers and have no access to your synced data.
privacy_intro: Expense Tracker Genius is designed with your privacy as a top priority. All your financial data — transactions, accounts, budgets, and goals — is stored locally on your device. We do not have access to your financial information, and we never will.
privacy_merchant_logos: To display merchant and bank logos, the app may fetch icon images from Google's favicon service using the merchant's website domain name (e.g., "chase.com"). Only the domain name is sent — no personal or financial data. These requests are subject to Google's privacy policy. Logo images are cached locally on your device.
privacy_meta_description: Privacy Policy for Expense Tracker Genius iOS app
privacy_rights:
Expense Tracker Genius has no servers or remote databases. We do not store any of your data — it all lives on your device and optionally in your personal iCloud account.

Because we never have your data, there is nothing to request, retrieve, or delete on our end. You are in full control:

• Disable analytics and crash reporting anytime (Settings → Security & Privacy)
• Export all your data (Settings → Export Data)
• Delete all your data by removing the app
• Manage iCloud data through your device's iCloud settings

For California residents: we do not sell personal information and do not use it for targeted advertising.
privacy_siri: If you use Siri or Shortcuts, certain financial data (account names, balances, budget names, spending summaries) may be indexed on-device by Apple's Siri system to enable voice commands and suggestions. This data is processed locally by iOS and is governed by Apple's privacy policy. We do not have access to Siri's index data.
privacy_third_parties:
We do not sell, share, or provide your personal or financial data to any third parties. External services used:

• Google Analytics for Firebase — anonymous usage statistics
• Firebase Crashlytics — anonymous crash reports
• Google Favicon Service — merchant logo images (domain names only)
• Apple CloudKit — encrypted iCloud sync (optional)
• Apple Foundation Models — on-device AI (no data leaves device)

Both analytics services can be disabled in Settings → Security & Privacy.
privacy_travel:
The Travel Planner feature uses Apple Intelligence (on-device AI) to estimate travel costs including transport prices, hotel rates, activity costs, and weather forecasts. All AI processing runs entirely on your device — no travel data is sent to external servers.

The app uses Apple MapKit for driving distance and duration calculations, hotel search, geocoding locations, and displaying maps. MapKit requests are handled by Apple's services and governed by Apple's privacy policy.

Important: All prices, durations, and suggestions provided by the Travel Planner are AI-generated estimates and may be inaccurate. They should not be relied upon for financial decisions. Always verify prices with official sources before booking.

Travel plans are stored locally on your device and synced via iCloud if enabled, just like your other financial data.
privacy_watch_widgets: If you use the Apple Watch app or home screen widgets, a summary of your financial data (balances, budgets, recent expenses) is shared securely between the main app, widgets, and the Watch app using Apple's App Group and WatchConnectivity frameworks. This data stays on your devices and is never sent to external servers.
terms_acceptance: By downloading, installing, or using Expense Tracker Genius, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the app.
terms_contact: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at hussein.juybari@gmail.com.
terms_data_backups: Your data is stored locally on your device. While we offer iCloud Sync and data export features, we are not responsible for data loss due to device failure, software issues, accidental deletion, or any other cause. We strongly recommend using the Export Data feature regularly to maintain backups of your financial data.
terms_exchange_rates: Exchange rates displayed in this app are provided for informational purposes only. Fiat currency rates are sourced from the European Central Bank (via Frankfurter API) and cryptocurrency prices from the Binance public API. Rates are cached and may not reflect real-time market prices. Cryptocurrency prices are inherently volatile and displayed estimates may differ significantly from actual market prices at the time of transaction. The developer is not responsible for any financial losses resulting from reliance on exchange rate data displayed in the app. Always verify current rates with your bank or exchange before making financial decisions.
terms_governing_law: These Terms of Use shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation. If a resolution cannot be reached, disputes shall be submitted to binding arbitration.
terms_liability: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall the developer be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or financial losses, arising out of or in connection with your use of the app. Our total liability for any claim arising from or related to these terms shall not exceed the amount you paid for the app in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.
terms_license: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use Expense Tracker Genius for your personal, non-commercial use on Apple devices that you own or control, subject to these terms and the Apple Media Services Terms and Conditions.
terms_meta_description: Terms of Use for Expense Tracker Genius iOS app
terms_meta_title: Terms of Use — Expense Tracker Genius
terms_modifications: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be reflected in the app with an updated "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the app after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms. We recommend reviewing these terms periodically.
terms_not_financial_advice: IMPORTANT: Expense Tracker Genius is a personal finance tracking and budgeting tool only. It does NOT provide financial advice, investment recommendations, tax guidance, or accounting services. The AI-powered insights are informational suggestions based on your spending patterns and should not be relied upon for financial decisions. Always consult a qualified financial advisor for professional financial advice. We are not responsible for any financial decisions you make based on information displayed in this app.
terms_termination: You may stop using the app at any time by deleting it from your device. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the app if you violate these terms. Upon termination, your local data remains on your device until you delete the app.
terms_third_party: The app uses third-party services (Firebase Analytics, Firebase Crashlytics, Apple CloudKit) that are governed by their own terms of service and privacy policies. We are not responsible for the practices of these third-party services. By using the app, you also agree to comply with the applicable terms of these services.
terms_travel:
The Travel Planner provides AI-generated estimates for transport, accommodation, activities, meals, and weather. These estimates are approximations based on on-device AI processing and may differ significantly from actual prices.

Disclaimer: All travel cost estimates, hotel suggestions, activity recommendations, transport durations, and weather forecasts are generated by Apple Intelligence and Apple MapKit. They are provided for planning purposes only and should not be considered accurate or reliable. Prices change frequently and vary by season, availability, and booking platform. Always verify all information with official sources, booking platforms, and service providers before making any financial commitments.

The developer is not responsible for any financial loss, booking errors, or travel disruptions resulting from reliance on AI-generated estimates or suggestions.
terms_user_responsibilities:
You are responsible for:

• The accuracy of financial data you enter into the app
• Maintaining backups of your data using the Export feature
• Keeping your device secure and protecting access to the app
• Complying with all applicable laws regarding your financial records
• Not using the app for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
terms_warranty_disclaimer: Expense Tracker Genius is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, accuracy, or non-infringement. We do not warrant that the app will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components. Receipt scanning (OCR) and AI insights may produce inaccurate results — always verify important financial information independently.
travel_meta_description: Estimate your travel expenses in seconds. Get daily budget breakdowns for 25+ destinations with live exchange rates.
travel_meta_title: Travel Budget Planner — Expense Tracker Genius
travel_subtitle: Estimate your travel expenses in seconds
